query:
UPDATE assessment_competencias 
SET microInicio = '2025-10-15', microTermino = '2026-03-30'
WHERE assessmentPdiId IN (
  SELECT ap.id FROM assessment_pdi ap
  JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
  WHERE a.externalId IN ('651877', '651878', '651879', '651880')
  AND ap.trilhaId = 60001
)
AND competenciaId IN (60015, 60023, 60032)
AND microInicio IS NULL;
command:
